MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Dec-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for compromise of a disable adualt hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Issa Michael, Esq. for and with Petitioner(s): Esperanza Ahumada, as guardian ad litem for Claimant Jaime Arevalo, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $25,000.00
Medical expenses total $12,966.94
Costs $5,734.55
A net balance of $56,298.51 to remaine in the client's trust account and transfer and placed in a special needs trust when created and filed with and under the supervision of the Probate Dept. Status hearing is set for 04-26-12 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for status.
Counsel to prepare order and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.
12-23-11
Proposed Order received, approved and signed by Judge Sullivan.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Good Cause. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Set For Trial On Jan-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-30-11 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 303
